calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-10-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF EMA BELL's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Granted. The settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements and no opposition was filed.

Order for approving proposition 65 settelement and consent Judgment is signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/HEK)
